creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
The description file tells you how to add the freefonts to 
	your X11 font path, but the command has the wrong path.

Fix: 

change that line in the description to read:
		$ xset fp+ /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/fonts/freefont
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just TRY to do:
		$ xset fp+ /usr/X11R6/lib/fonts/freefont
	:-)
